tooltip.earth_online.natural_source: Natural source: realistic deposit/vein material; process it in industrial machines.
tooltip.earth_online.material.header: Earth Online material: follow the next step; no chemistry memorization required.
tooltip.earth_online.material.notebook: Tip: right-click the Field Geology Notebook for the full route guide.
tooltip.earth_online.notebook.use: Right-click to open the Earth Online beginner handbook.
tooltip.earth_online.notebook.core: Core idea: real sources + multi-step processing + MC item compatibility.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.use: Right-click: open the machine GUI and place material like a furnace.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.redstone: Redstone modes: always active / requires signal / requires no signal.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.routes: Built-in routes: %s. JEI can show the full list.
tooltip.earth_online.route.multiple: Multiple routes exist; right-click the matching machine or check JEI.
tooltip.earth_online.route.compat: Use: compatible with the MC ecosystem or reserved for future integration routes.
tooltip.earth_online.support.casing: Multiblock part: structural shell for large skids, furnaces, and tower bases. It switches to formed-machine art when assembled.
tooltip.earth_online.support.pipe: Multiblock part: process piping for fluids, gases, hot lines, and tower internals. It switches to formed-machine art when assembled.
tooltip.earth_online.support.control_pan: Multiblock part: place in front of a large machine controller; right-click the formed panel to open the connected machine.
tooltip.earth_online.multiblock.heavy_fr: Structure: front control panel; casing left, right, back, and rear corners to form a rectangular heavy frame.
tooltip.earth_online.multiblock.wet_vess: Structure: front control panel; pipes on both sides and rear corners, casing behind, forming a vessel with process piping.
tooltip.earth_online.multiblock.heated_l: Structure: front control panel; casing left/right/back and three top pipes, forming an enclosed furnace train.
tooltip.earth_online.multiblock.tall_col: Structure: front control panel; 3x2 base casing plus three vertical pipe blocks for the tower body.
screen.earth_online.machine.empty_input: Place a valid material in the left input slot.
screen.earth_online.machine.unsupported_: This material cannot be processed by this machine.
screen.earth_online.machine.structure.no: This compact machine does not need extra blocks.
screen.earth_online.machine.structure.we: Need: front panel + side/rear-corner pipes + rear casing.
screen.earth_online.machine.structure.he: Need: front panel + furnace casing + three top pipe blocks.
screen.earth_online.machine.structure.ta: Need: front panel + 3x2 base + three tower pipe blocks above.
screen.earth_online.redstone.always.desc: Works whenever valid input and output space exist.
screen.earth_online.redstone.require_sig: Works only while receiving a redstone signal.
screen.earth_online.redstone.require_no_: Pauses while receiving a redstone signal.
screen.earth_online.redstone.tooltip: Modes: always active / signal required / no signal required.
message.earth_online.control_panel.not_c: This control panel is not connected to a formed large machine yet.
screen.earth_online.notebook.title: Earth Online Field Geology Notebook
screen.earth_online.notebook.subtitle: For non-technical players: follow routes; no chemistry exam required.
screen.earth_online.notebook.footer: Mouse wheel to read; machines now accept materials in slots like furnaces.
jei.earth_online.notebook.1: Not a chemistry exam: it tells you what you found, which machine comes next, and what compatible item you get.
jei.earth_online.notebook.2: Recipe: one dirt, any plank, or any stone.
jei.earth_online.notebook.3: Use: right-click to open pages; machine GUI also has a Book button.
jei.earth_online.notebook.4: JEI integration: notebook, machines, and materials share the same route hints.
jei.earth_online.route.footer: If there are many routes, check the matching machine category in JEI or right-click the notebook.
guide.earth_online.line1: Goal: keep MC ingots, gems, and crafting magic, but make mineral sources, rocks, deposits, and processing routes more realistic.
guide.earth_online.line2: 1. Vanilla ores are no longer the natural source; iron comes mainly from magnetite Fe3O4, copper from chalcopyrite CuFeS2, and gold often from quartz veins.
guide.earth_online.line3: 2. You do not need chemistry knowledge: right-click machines, put material in the input slot, and outputs appear automatically.
guide.earth_online.line4: 3. Basic route: ore -> crusher -> chunks -> ball mill -> powder -> separation/flotation/roasting/reduction.
guide.earth_online.line5: 4. Magnetite route: magnetite dust -> magnetic separator -> iron concentrate + tailings; iron concentrate -> reduction furnace -> iron ingot + slag.
guide.earth_online.line6: 5. Chalcopyrite route: chalcopyrite dust -> flotation cell -> copper concentrate; concentrate -> roaster -> roasted concentrate + sulfur; then reduction/electrolysis.
guide.earth_online.line7: 6. Rocks are not single formulas: granite can yield quartz, feldspar, mica, monazite, and tailings; calcite/dripstone mostly feed carbonate routes.
guide.earth_online.line8: Tip: large machines need simple multiblock parts; the GUI shows what is missing.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.jaw_crusher: Coarsely crushes ore and deposit blocks into chunks, usually producing tailings or associated minerals.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.ball_mill.d: Grinds chunks and rocks into powders; the basic step for mineral separation.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.sieve.descr: Performs simplified size and density separation for tailings, kimberlite, and auriferous quartz.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.magnetic_se: Separates iron-bearing fractions from magnetite, hematite, and mafic silicate powders.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.flotation_c: Concentrates sulfide ores and gem minerals into copper, gold, lapis, and redstone concentrates.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.ore_roaster: Thermally treats sulfides, cinnabar, and carbonates to produce roasted ores, sulfur, or lime.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.reduction_f: Uses a simplified carbothermal route to turn concentrates into MC-compatible ingots plus slag.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.leaching_ta: Simulates hydrometallurgy and selective extraction from quartz veins, beryl, and redstone concentrates.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.electrolyti: Uses electrochemical refining for copper, gold, lapis, beryl concentrates, and gas routes.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.powder_pres: Presses powders or concentrates back into MC-compatible items to keep inventories manageable.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.chemical_re: Handles simplified acid-base, acid leaching, oxidation, and common inorganic reactions.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.distillatio: Separates brines, acids, crude oil, and coal tar into more concentrated chemical fractions.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.mixer.descr: Mixes powders and intermediates into glass batch, cement raw meal, fertilizer blend, and composites.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.crystallize: Organizes salts, caustic soda, ammonium nitrate, gypsum, and similar products into stackable solids.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.industrial_: Processes glass, cement, bauxite, ceramics, and other high-temperature calcination routes.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.gas_separat: Recovers hydrogen, ammonia, hydrochloric acid, oxygen, nitrogen, and other gas products.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.fertilizer_: Turns nitrogen, phosphate, and compound fertilizer intermediates into transportable granules.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.polymerizer: Polymerizes ethylene, propylene, vinyl chloride, styrene, and other monomers into common plastics.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.steam_crack: Cracks coal tar, naphtha, diesel fractions, and gas feeds into olefins, aromatics, and syngas routes.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.synthesis_l: Represents high-pressure loop chemistry such as ammonia, methanol, urea, and resin precursors.
tooltip.earth_online.machine.absorption_: Absorbs acidic or chlorine-bearing gases into useful acids, alkali salts, and treatment products.
